---
title: "Courses"
author: "Zach Barrett"
date: last-modified
---

***

If you are looking for what was on this website before, I have moved the content [here](./docs/electronics-project/troubleshooting.qmd).

Otherwise, take a look at these:

- [ENEL602 - Electronics Project](./docs/electronics-project/Electronics Project.qmd)
- [PHYS401 - Foundation Physics B](./docs/physics-B/Foundation Physics B.qmd)
